description: Use this tool only when you need data that contacts_get_summary does not provide. Prefer contacts_get_summary whenever possible. This tool returns all matching contacts in a single result; for very large datasets the server may expose the result via a cached resource instead of inline content. Use this tool directly only when a single call to this tool is sufficient to complete the user's request; for any sequence of two or more tool calls, use the `batch_action` tool instead.

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to call APIs on behalf of a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested by the user.

contacts.description: Array of full contact objects as returned by the Textellent API. Use contacts_get_summary when you only need a minimal listing (id, name, phone, pagination).

items.description: Full contact data (all fields currently provided by the Textellent contacts API). The exact shape may evolve over time.

totalCount.description: Total number of contacts available for the given filter
